name: CPLL
description: Corner Permutation of the Last Layer — 2 cases (plus skip). Permute all 4 corners into their correct positions. Used as step 1 of 2-look PLL, before EPLL.

algorithms.name: Adjacent Corner Swap
algorithms.notation: R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R' U' R U R' F'

alternatives.notation: R U R' F' R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R'

algorithms.setup: Two corners on one side need to swap. Find the side where both corners are already correct (headlights = two matching stickers). Hold headlights on the LEFT, then apply the algorithm.

algorithms.name: Diagonal Corner Swap
algorithms.notation: F R U' R' U' R U R' F' R U R' U' R' F R F'

alternatives.notation: R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R' U' R U R' F' U2 R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R' U' R U R' F'
alternatives.note: Two adjacent swaps — safe fallback if you forget the Y-perm

algorithms.setup: No side has two matching corner stickers (no headlights anywhere). All 4 corners are in wrong positions. Apply from any angle.
